name: Nanaimo Salmon and Mushroom Kebabs
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F.
2. Cut salmon meat into cube-shaped pieces (about 1 inch).
3. Mix salad oil, lemon juice, salt, pepper, and parsley in a bowl.
4. Place salmon in the marinade and refrigerate for 1 hour.
5. Slice mushrooms into large pieces.
6. Drain salmon for 10 minutes.
7. Melt butter in a frying pan.
8. Toss salmon and mushrooms in melted butter.
9. Alternate salmon and mushroom pieces on skewers to form kebabs.
10. Lightly sprinkle with breadcrumbs, turning to distribute evenly.
11. Season with salt and pepper.
12. Place kebabs on a rack over a baking dish in the center of the oven at 450°F.
13. Cook for 15 minutes (longer if cubes are larger than 1 inch).
14. Remove kebabs from the oven and sprinkle with chopped fresh parsley.
15. Serve immediately with lemon wedges on the side.
